title: Millionfold v0.1.2 Landing & Split Routing
content:
Millionfold has been updated to v0.1.2, introducing split-routing and a custom landing page.

Key additions:

  • Split Routing Architecture: Configured local Vite dev servers and production Apache rules to serve a static landing page at the root URL (/) and route the main SPA to (/home).
  • Aesthetic Customization: Customized the landing page to a rich money green (#15803d) and added Keep Notes image equalization copy.
  • Routing Loop Correction: Resolved a dev-server redirect loop by base-prefixing the SPA index rewrite targets.
